items.name_cn:
#Small Signature Bucket Bag in Black
This Signature bucket bag is a new arrival from the 2025 Spring/Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, highlighting a soft silhouette and versatile design. Crafted from black calfskin, it features tonal pebbled leather details and a vintage gold-finish metal Christian Dior Paris logo on the front. The spacious compartment features a snap closure and leather strap opening, offering a secure place for daily essentials, with an interior pocket for added refinement. The small size comes with a top leather handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, allowing for easy carrying by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.
Metal snap closure and leather strap opening; top leather handle
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap; interior pocket
Model: 2366
Dimensions: 21×19×11cm (L×H×W)
Fits 1 smartphone, 1 wallet, 2 card holders, sunglasses, and lipstick

items.name_cn:
=
This new LuLu bag is absolutely stunning. I was captivated by this crescent bag at first sight, and the sophistication is maxed out. It is super super good-looking ✨. It elevates your look instantly, and the best part is the bag shape!
Can be salty or sweet, suitable for commuting, dates, crossbody, or shoulder bag. It looks great in all styles, and the capacity is completely sufficient for daily use. Paired with a hoodie, it is very casual and relaxed. It is truly versatile!
This bag also brings an effortless sense of relaxation.
Specs: 21x24×5 cm, moderate size
Model: 120723
